description: Grey handbag that has stitch detailing with crystal embellishments and bead work on the front and a pleated design on the sidesOne main zipped compartment that has two inner zipped pockets  and an organiser sleeveTwo zipped pockets on the sidesTwo short handles woven through metallic loops with a stud design and one long, removable and adjustable strap for carrying ease and styleOne zipped pocket at the back
